name: SOCKET MOBILE, INC.
summary: Socket Mobile, Inc. designs and markets data capture products, primarily barcode scanners, for mobile computing applications. The company's products are intended to work with third-party hardware and software platforms and are distributed through various channels. Socket Mobile serves markets requiring mobile data collection, including emerging standards such as RFID and Near Field Communications (NFC) for data capture solutions.

products.name: Barcode Scanners
products.description: Data capture devices designed for mobile computing environments supporting barcode scanning applications.

products.name: RFID/Near Field Communications Data Capture Products
products.description: Data capture products supporting emerging RFID and NFC standards for mobile data collection.
